questions.question: How does Vite achieve an instant dev server start regardless of project size?
options: It pre-compiles all files to a binary cache on first run
It bundles only the entry file and lazy-loads the rest
It serves files via native ES modules on demand instead of bundling upfront
It uses a persistent worker process that pre-warms all files

questions.question: Which bundler does Vite use for production builds?
What tool does Vite use to pre-bundle dependencies like `vue` and `lodash`?
